# Origin Dev Labs

> Origin Dev Labs builds automation systems, intelligent agents, and custom software that save businesses time and money. Serving clients nationwide.

## Quick Summary

- **What we do:** Business automation, AI chatbots, smart assistants, BI dashboards, web development, UI/UX design, digital products, and custom software
- **Who we serve:** Small to mid-size businesses looking to eliminate repetitive work and scale operations
- **Pricing:** Fixed-fee projects with no long-term contracts. Workflow automation from $1,500, websites from $5,000, custom software from $20,000
- **Contact:** hello@origindevlabs.com
- **Website:** https://origindevlabs.com

## Services

1. **Workflow Automation** — Automate CRM data entry, invoicing, onboarding, email follow-ups, and cross-platform syncing. Projects from $1,500, typically 2-8 weeks.
2. **Intelligent Agents** — AI-powered chatbots with CRM integration, brand-trained responses, and 70%+ inquiry deflection. From $2,500 (FAQ bot) to $150,000+ (agentic AI).
3. **Smart Assistants** — 24/7 AI-powered administrative assistants handling inbox, CRM, scheduling, and reporting. From $1,500/month.
4. **Business Intelligence** — Custom dashboards connecting QuickBooks, HubSpot, Google Analytics, and more. Projects from $10,000.
5. **Web Development** — Responsive, SEO-optimized websites built on Next.js or WordPress. Business sites from $5,000 (6-12 weeks), e-commerce from $15,000.
6. **UI/UX Design** — Research-driven design with usability testing, prototyping, and developer handoff. UX audits from $3,000, full product design from $40,000.
7. **Digital Products** — SaaS platforms, mobile apps (iOS/Android/cross-platform), and marketplaces. MVPs from $50,000 (3-6 months).
8. **Custom Solutions** — Bespoke software with full IP ownership. Projects from $20,000, enterprise platforms to $1,000,000+.

## Key Differentiators

- **Fixed-fee pricing** with no surprises and no long-term contracts
- **Clients own 100%** of source code and intellectual property
- **Month-to-month retainers** for ongoing support
- **Agile sprints** with weekly progress check-ins
- **Enterprise-grade security** including SOC2-compliant processes

## Process

1. **Discovery** — Audit your current processes and identify automation opportunities
2. **Proposal** — Fixed-price proposal with clear scope and timeline
3. **Build** — Agile sprints with regular demos and feedback loops
4. **Launch** — Thorough testing, deployment, and team training
5. **Support** — Ongoing maintenance, monitoring, and optimization

## Pages

- [Home](https://origindevlabs.com) — Overview of services and value proposition
- [About](https://origindevlabs.com/about) — Our story, mission, and team
- [Services](https://origindevlabs.com/services) — Detailed service descriptions and pricing ranges
- [Client Stories](https://origindevlabs.com/testimonials) — Case studies and testimonials
- [FAQ](https://origindevlabs.com/faq) — Common questions about costs, timelines, and processes for all 8 service categories
- [Get Started](https://origindevlabs.com/get-started) — Free consultation questionnaire

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Workflow Automation

**What types of business processes can you automate?**
CRM data entry, invoice processing, client onboarding, email follow-ups, project management updates, and cross-platform data syncing. Most businesses save 10-15+ hours per week.

**How much does workflow automation cost?**
$1,500-$15,000 for projects, $500-$5,000/month for ongoing retainers. Fixed-fee pricing, no long-term contracts.

**How long does implementation take?**
Simple automations: 2-4 weeks. Mid-complexity: 4-8 weeks. Full operations overhauls: 8-16 weeks.

**Will automation replace jobs?**
No. It eliminates repetitive tasks so teams focus on higher-value work. Most businesses redeploy saved hours toward revenue-generating activities.

### Intelligent Agents

**What's the difference between a basic FAQ chatbot and an AI-powered chatbot?**
FAQ bots match keywords to scripted responses. AI chatbots use retrieval-augmented generation to understand context, cite sources, and handle follow-up questions naturally. AI chatbots deflect 70%+ of support inquiries.

**Can a chatbot integrate with my existing CRM and business tools?**
Yes — HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, project management tools, payment systems, and custom APIs. Chatbots can look up orders, update records, schedule appointments, and trigger workflows.

**How much does an AI chatbot cost?**
FAQ bots: $2,500-$10,000. AI-powered: $10,000-$50,000 + $500-$5,000/month. Agentic AI: $50,000-$150,000+.

**Will the chatbot sound robotic?**
No. Trained on your brand voice and terminology. Includes source citations and human escalation for complex situations.

### Smart Assistants

**What can a smart assistant do that a regular VA cannot?**
Processes data instantly across multiple systems, works 24/7 without breaks, learns from interactions, and escalates complex tasks to your team.

**How much does it cost compared to hiring?**
Full-time admin hire: $40,000-$60,000/year + benefits. Smart assistant: $1,500-$5,000/month with 24/7 availability and instant scalability.

**Is my data secure?**
Yes — encrypted transmission, role-based access controls, SOC2-compliant processes, isolated environments, and full audit trails.

### Business Intelligence

**What is a BI dashboard?**
Consolidates data from CRM, accounting, marketing, and operations into a single visual interface showing KPIs and trends at a glance.

**How much does a custom dashboard cost?**
$10,000-$50,000 for projects, $500-$3,000/month for maintenance. Fixed-price proposals after discovery.

**Can you connect my existing tools?**
Yes — HubSpot, Salesforce, QuickBooks, Xero, Google Ads, Meta, GA4, project management tools, and custom databases.

### Web Development

**How much does a custom website cost?**
$5,000-$25,000 for business sites, $15,000-$75,000+ for e-commerce. Includes responsive design, on-page SEO, and security setup.

**How long does it take?**
6-12 weeks for business sites, 12-24 weeks for e-commerce/complex applications. Agile sprints with weekly progress updates.

**Will it be SEO-optimized?**
Yes — meta tags, header structure, image optimization, schema markup, mobile-first design, fast load speeds. Google Analytics and Search Console included.

### UI/UX Design

**What does a UI/UX agency do differently?**
Researches users, maps journeys, tests prototypes, and validates with real data. Every design decision backed by user research and usability testing.

**How much does UI/UX design cost?**
UX audit: $3,000-$10,000. Single-flow redesign: $8,000-$30,000. Full product design: $40,000-$250,000. Retainers from $5,000/month.

### Digital Products

**How much does digital product development cost?**
MVP: $50,000-$150,000 (3-6 months). Full-featured: $150,000-$500,000+ (6-18 months). Transparent pricing with milestones.

**iOS, Android, or both?**
We build native and cross-platform (Flutter/React Native). Cross-platform is 30-40% more cost-effective. Native for maximum performance.

### Custom Solutions

**When should I choose custom software over SaaS?**
When existing tools don't fit your workflows, you're paying for unused features, you need data/security control, or SaaS costs exceed building your own.

**Will I own the source code?**
Yes — 100% ownership of all IP, source code, and documentation. No vendor lock-in.

**How much does it cost?**
Modest: $20,000-$50,000. Mid-range: $50,000-$200,000. Enterprise: $200,000-$1,000,000+.

## Contact
